scripts.test:security: node -e "if (!process.env.DATABASE_URL) { console.error('DATABASE_URL is required for the blocking security/RLS suite'); process.exit(1); }" && turbo run test:unit --filter=@smart-fasal/application --filter=@smart-fasal/authz --filter=@smart-fasal/browser-auth --filter=@smart-fasal/database --filter=@smart-fasal/domain-api --filter=@smart-fasal/farmer-web --filter=@smart-fasal/mp-query-api --filter=@smart-fasal/mp-web --filter=@smart-fasal/rsk-web --force
scripts.test:coverage: turbo run test:unit --filter=!@smart-fasal/intelligence-service -- --coverage --coverage.reporter=text --coverage.reporter=lcov && turbo run test:coverage --filter=@smart-fasal/intelligence-service
scripts.quality: pnpm format:check && pnpm architecture:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm contracts:check && pnpm test && pnpm test:integration && pnpm build
